head: 770c239eb8cce7d954fc45ae932d4134837b18df
notes: wall clock launch->pre-merge-gate from session transcript (21:36:49->21:47:06); 16min operator idle occurred post-gate (phone call) and is excluded; operator accidentally approved gate after idle - integration branch intact, not merged; cost from transcript token counts, cache-discounted (writes x1.25, reads x0.1); weekly pct display granularity 1pt so delta 1.0 means 0-2; engine judgment call at launch: workflow resolved via scriptPath not by-name; weekly-pct delta decomposed from local transcripts (API-equiv in window): run session $10.29 (71%), orchestrator session $3.92 (27%), unrelated vibes-diy $0.35 (2%) -> run-attributable delta ~0.7 of the 1.0pt measured; raw weekly_pct kept as measured; cost_usd corrected 9.98->4.59: original extraction double-counted streamed transcript events; corrected method (dedup by message id + toolUseResult subagent usage, cache writes x1.25 flat) validated to-the-cent against the CC client cost display on mixed-A-1

head: 4e9f7a7af1f378a55be1c00127bb2404103825ac
notes: wall clock launch->pre-merge-gate from session transcript (22:20:28->22:28:11); gate Esc'd without approval per protocol, so run dir was still on main at scoring - scored via --branch; cost from transcript token counts (15 subagents), cache-discounted (writes x1.25, reads x0.1); weekly-pct delta decomposed from local transcripts: run $13.17 (77%), orchestrator session $3.95 (23%) -> run-attributable ~0.77 of the 1.0pt measured, granularity 1pt; engine judgment call at launch: workflow resolved via scriptPath not by-name (same as degrade-B-1); cost_usd corrected 13.17->6.45: original extraction double-counted streamed transcript events; corrected method (dedup by message id + toolUseResult subagent usage, cache writes x1.25 flat) validated to-the-cent against the CC client cost display on mixed-A-1

head: 5f2230350e2fed9856a9df3a9b97b2ea4349274f
notes: cost from CC client session display ($36.23, screenshot 23:25), reproduced exactly by extract_tokens.py over both project-dir transcripts; wall clock launch(22:37:39)->plan-complete report(23:24:05)=2786s from transcript; weekly before-snapshot 80% recovered from operator screenshot at 22:37:13 and operator-confirmed; verified serial: 19 sequential Task dispatches (6 impl, 12 review, 1 final), zero Workflow calls; CC auto-resolved implementer subagents to haiku(5)/sonnet(1), reviewers+orchestrator fable - condition A session defaults as actually used; review feedback applied as commits on 5/6 tasks per normal SDD flow, final review approved, no retries so fix_rounds=0 per protocol; scored on worktree branch worktree-apistub-users-api (operator Esc'd merge prompt); window decomposition: run 100%, orchestrator ~$0.2

head: c126514611d59ab4585cca6b7c9f3864e338a6fd

head: ac06277d3b7523811675805dd802f7e024f80d74
notes: tierOverrides {cheap:'opus',standard:'opus'} applied per protocol at wave gate (verified: all 6 tasks tier=opus, zero haiku/sonnet in extraction); cost via extract_tokens.py (22 files, opus $10.51 + fable orchestrator $3.47); wall clock launch(00:22:21)->pre-merge report start(00:45:59)=1418s - operator paused during report assembly so gate AskUserQuestion never fired, report-start used as gate marker; task 4 reviewVerdict=fixed with 1 fix iteration - first fix round in the matrix; knob revision at wave gate is condition setup, not a redirect; window decomposition: run $13.98, orchestrator $0.35 idle-tail, no other sessions
